overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury cyberpunk apartment from Cyberpunk 2077. The player character slowly walks through a high-end residential space featuring neon lighting, holographic displays, and modern furnishings, transitioning from a bar area through living spaces to a bedroom, bathroom, office, and wardrobe.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment bar and dining area

events.description: begins in the kitchen bar area with neon accent lighting
pans left along the bar counter revealing the dining table

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the modern kitchen bar and dining area, observing the city view through window blinds

entered.detail: dark marble countertop with glassware and bar stools
modern kitchen island with appliances and neon underlighting
rectangular table with red placemats near the windows
modern sectional sofa in the living area
horizontal blinds covering large windows showing city lights outside

segments.scene_description: The clip opens in a high-end cyberpunk apartment bar area with dark marble counters and neon lighting. The camera slowly pans left along the kitchen island, revealing a dining table with red placemats and a living area with modern furniture, all overlooking the Night City skyline through partially closed blinds.

events.description: moves from living area into the bedroom space
approaches the illuminated platform bed with sleeping figure

agents.ego_description: walking from the living room past abstract wall art and bamboo dividers toward the bedroom platform

notable_agents.action: person lying under covers on the platform bed, apparently sleeping

entered.detail: large colorful abstract painting on the teal wall
tall bamboo plants in planter dividing the space
raised platform bed with integrated lighting and white bedding
flat screen television mounted on the wall above a console

segments.scene_description: Moving from the living area, the camera passes a large abstract painting and bamboo room dividers to enter the bedroom. The space features a raised platform bed with integrated floor lighting, where a figure lies sleeping under the covers. A wall-mounted TV and modern furnishings complete the cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bathroom with shower and vanity

events.description: enters the bathroom from the bedroom
lighting shifts to cooler blue-teal tones in the bathroom

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom and examining the vanity area, mirror, and glass shower enclosure

entered.detail: modern vanity with integrated sink and orange accent lighting
large rectangular mirror with overhead lighting
walk-in shower with glass block walls and rainfall showerhead
illuminated wall art featuring athletic figures
white towels hanging on hooks near the shower

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a luxurious bathroom featuring marble floors and cool blue-teal lighting. The space includes a modern vanity with orange accent lighting, a large mirror, and a glass-enclosed shower. A backlit poster and hanging towels add to the high-end residential atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: home office with red ambient lighting

events.description: dramatic shift to red neon ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: moving through the bedroom to the office nook featuring multiple monitors and red accent lighting

entered.detail: large desk with equipment and red ambient lighting underneath
ergonomic office chair positioned at the desk
array of screens displaying data and graphs mounted above the desk
red neon light strip illuminating the wall and equipment rack
shelving unit with electronic equipment and storage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bathroom, the camera moves to a dedicated office space bathed in red neon light. The area features a large desk with an ergonomic chair, multiple monitors displaying data, and an equipment rack. The dramatic red lighting contrasts with the cooler tones of the bathroom and bedroom areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom with holographic displays and wardrobe

events.description: holographic ceiling displays become visible above the bed
approaches the wardrobe and closet area

agents.ego_description: returning to the bedroom area, observing the holographic ceiling display and ending at the wardrobe

entered.detail: floating holographic projections with blue and red imagery above the bed
open closet with clothing rack and storage shelves
rack with hanging jackets and folded clothes on shelves above

segments.scene_description: The final segment returns to the bedroom where holographic displays project colorful imagery onto the ceiling above the platform bed. The camera then moves toward an open wardrobe closet featuring hanging clothing and storage shelves, concluding the tour of the apartment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a luxury cyberpunk apartment, transitioning from a moody social area into private, neon-lit residential quarters. It begins in a bar area with dark marble counters, panning left across a kitchen island and dining table toward a living space that overlooks the Night City skyline. As the camera moves past abstract art and bamboo dividers, the scene shifts into a bedroom featuring a raised platform bed with integrated floor lighting, before gliding further into a bathroom defined by cool blue-teal marble and orange accent lights. The perspective then flows into a dedicated office space bathed in dramatic red neon light and filled with data monitors, before turning back toward the bedroom. Finally, the camera passes under colorful holographic ceiling projections and moves into an open wardrobe closet to conclude the tour.
